narration: Ever wonder why you see lightning before you hear thunder?
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever wonder why you see lightning before you hear thunder?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder why you see lightning before you hear thunder?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Ever wonder why you see lightning before you hear thunder?

narration: Light travels at about 299,792 kilometers per second. That’s way faster than sound, which is just 343 meters per second!
visual_description: Context visual: Light travels at about 299,792 kilometers per second. That’s way faster than sound, which is just 343 meters per second!
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Light travels at about 299,792 kilometers per second. That’s way faster than sound, which is just 343 meters per second!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Light travels at about 299,792 kilometers per second. That’s way faster than sound, which is just 343 meters per second!

narration: So when lightning strikes, the light reaches you instantly. But sound? It takes its sweet time.
visual_description: Escalation visual: So when lightning strikes, the light reaches you instantly. But sound? It takes its sweet time.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: So when lightning strikes, the light reaches you instantly. But sound? It takes its sweet time.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: So when lightning strikes, the light reaches you instantly. But sound? It takes its sweet time.

narration: For every five seconds between the flash and the boom, you're roughly one mile away from the strike.
visual_description: Evidence visual: For every five seconds between the flash and the boom, you're roughly one mile away from the strike.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: For every five seconds between the flash and the boom, you're roughly one mile away from the strike.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: For every five seconds between the flash and the boom, you're roughly one mile away from the strike.

narration: So next time you see lightning, count the seconds until you hear thunder. That’s your distance check!
visual_description: Payoff visual: So next time you see lightning, count the seconds until you hear thunder. That’s your distance check!
